[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends for DIY home improvement combined with XLP relative strength",
    "family": "attention_sentiment",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly for 'home improvement' and Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLP",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A spike in interest in DIY home improvement often precedes increased demand for consumer staples related to home care and building materials.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLP",
      "rationale": "Consumer staples benefit from increased home improvement spending signals."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long XLP when Google Trends for 'home improvement' rises more than 15% week-over-week and XLP outperforms SPY over prior week",
      "exit": "Exit after 3 weeks or if Google Trends decline by 10% week-over-week",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Weekly Google Trends data frequently show interest bursts around seasonal home projects."
  },
